description: ID5 (Abadir) — CH Decidable / Unique Representations. Cantor's diagonal assumes non-unique reps. The Beth staircase, P=NP, Hilbert's First Problem, FRAQTL factorization.
header:
# EGPT — ID5: Abadir's Idea (CH Decidable / Unique Representations)

> In maximally compressed information space, Cantor's diagonal fails; all infinities collapse onto ℕ.
> This file contains all primary artifacts for Idea #5.
> For the full framework: https://eabadir.github.io/EGPT/IDEAS.md
>
> Key claim: The Continuum Hypothesis is decidable because the EGPT hierarchy is bijective
> with the standard mathematical universe and the Beth staircase is integer-stepped.
> Hilbert's First Problem, resolved. P=NP is a corollary.

files.note: 'Is there a whole number between 0 and 1?'
